title: tephrosia quartiniana var. inflexa
intro: Tephrosia quartiniana var. inflexa, also known as a species of flowering plant in the legume family, is native to tropical Africa. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Tephrosia quartiniana var. inflexa include its potential to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Tephrosia quartiniana var. inflexa is traditionally prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and it can also be used in the form of dried leaves or roots.
